rules.rule_text:
title: Cisco Stage Data
id: 5e51acb2-bcbe-435b-99c6-0e3cd5e2aa59
status: test
description: Various protocols maybe used to put data on the device for exfil or infil
author: Austin Clark
date: 2019-08-12
modified: 2023-01-04
tags:
- attack.collection
- attack.lateral-movement
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.exfiltration
- attack.t1074
- attack.t1105
- attack.t1560.001
logsource:
  product: cisco
  service: aaa
detection:
  keywords:
  - tftp
  - rcp
  - puts
  - copy
  - configure replace
  - archive tar
  condition: keywords
falsepositives:
- Generally used to copy configs or IOS images
level: low
